exceptions.name: intel-mkl-src
exceptions.reason: The crate metadata omits SPDX. Its wrapper code is MIT; the statically bundled Intel MKL runtime is covered by the Intel Simplified Software License bundled in LICENSES/.

exceptions.name: polars-arrow-format
exceptions.reason: The crate metadata uses license-file rather than SPDX. Its packaged LICENSE is Apache-2.0; this was verified for the locked version and is bundled in LICENSES/Apache-2.0.txt.
